failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS publication_id, 
    pr.id AS profile_id, 
    p.num_likes + p.num_comments AS total_engagement
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE pr.username = 'haight_clothing'
ORDER BY total_engagement DESC
LIMIT 1;
